---
title: "Mary Albinia, Lady Crawley-Boevey"
---

## Mary Albinia, Lady Crawley-Boevey

**Dates:** (d.1835)

**Maiden name:** (Page)

### Description

mother of [[person:557]Blanche Gibbs], wife of Sir Thomas Crawley Boevey, 3rd Bt.

### Letters

- [To Helena Mary Heathcote, May 5 1898](../letters/3370_To_Helena_Mary_Heathcote.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
